creator: uspoerlein@gmail.com
text:
Looks good, so far. You might want to remove one flag from the
CONFIGURE_ARGS, though:

===>  Configuring for nss_ldap-1.264
configure: WARNING: Unrecognized options: --enable-schema-mapping
checking build system type... i386-portbld-freebsd7.1
checking host system type... i386-portbld-freebsd7.1
checking target system type... i386-portbld-freebsd7.1
...

Cheers,
Ulrich Spoerlein
